title: A Satisfied Customer
content: You track down a local business owner who frequently used Simon for catalog work. He looks surprised by your questions.||'Simon? Yes, I've used him for years. A real professional—punctual, polite, and has a great eye for detail. I was shocked to hear he was at the precinct.'||'He's a quiet man, Detective. Always seemed like the type to avoid a fight, not start one. I haven't seen anything that would suggest he's capable of... well, what they're saying.'
